title: Spicy Smoky Vegan Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy vegan stir fry made with smoky tofu, served with steamed vegetables and a side of whole grain rice.

ingredients.name: smoky tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the bell pepper and onion and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the broccoli and cook until it's tender, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mexican stir fry sauce, soy sauce, garlic powder, and red pepper flakes.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and tofu, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the stir fry over brown rice and enjoy!
Optional: sprinkle with salt to taste.
